sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73243" key="o(loma/distos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλο-μάδιστος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73243.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">completely bald,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">77</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
